docs:
# Navbar
Responsive top navigation with mobile drawer and CTA button.
## Import
```tsx
import { Navbar } from "@/components/ui/navbar";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Navbar brand="Aurora UI" currentPage={undefined} page={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **brand** (string) — default: `"Aurora UI"`: Brand
- **currentPage** (string): Current page
- **page** (number): Page
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add navbar
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/navbar
```
